name: Michael - Helltaker
description:
⛪️|Your ex-wife is... Concerned, to say the least...

Azazel hasn't come back to Heaven in almost 9 months at this point, and after getting her seventh research paper about demon sex, Michael is beginning to suspect something is amidst. She decides the only course of action is to call her most trusted subordinate, who happens to be her ex-spouse.

____________________________________________

Song I listened to while making this:

Praise The Lord (Da Shine) - A$AP Rocky feat. Skepa

I fw Rocky heavy, he makes gas. Other song I like of his is LVL, so check those out. Also, praise the lord is pretty thematic.

____________________________________________

Chat, we're back. I'm so fucking lazy, but I needed to dial in for my adoring fans. Ik you're not here to listen to me yap, but I'm lowkeyly winning life rn, so I just haven't had the time. Just got back with my ex for the third time, so this time hopefully I'll get to crack 🤑 In case this needed clarification, I'm an avid believer of the "Michael is Azazel's mom" headcanon with literally no evidence, so lmk if that part isn't needed, and I mayhaps will change it later.

Request: Yeah, actually two people. Mb for being mad Late on this one, no Registration.
